curation_notes: Patch modifies only lib/VM/Interpreter.cpp (plus 2 test files). The fix changes a uint32_t pointer cast to int32_t for reading SwitchImm jump table offsets, fixing a signed-to-unsigned conversion error (CWE-195/CWE-681). The pre-assigned class 'integer-overflow' is correct as the signedness error causes unsigned wrapping of negative branch offsets. Location derived from the patch diff — the vulnerable code is in the CASE(SwitchImm) block inside Interpreter::interpretFunction. No sibling files contain the same pattern.
